Economy & Taxation.position_summary: Socialdemokraterna advocates for a strong welfare state supported by fair taxation, with an emphasis on public investment and worker protections.
key_policies: Fair taxation to fund public services
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: a strong welfare state funded by fair taxation

Healthcare.position_summary: Socialdemokraterna supports a publicly funded healthcare system backed by fair taxation, with a focus on reducing waiting times through significant investment.
Healthcare.supporting_quote: We will invest heavily in public healthcare to reduce waiting times.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Socialdemokraterna supports an ambitious transition away from fossil fuels, committing to a phase-out by 2035 alongside significant investment in renewable energy sources.
key_policies: Transition to a greener energy system
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: we will phase out fossil fuels by 2035 and invest in renewable energy

Immigration.position_summary: Socialdemokraterna supports an immigration approach that is both humane and orderly, emphasizing structured processes and clear pathways for integration into Swedish society.
key_policies: Humane treatment of immigrants and asylum seekers
Clear pathways to integration for newcomers
Immigration.supporting_quote: Immigration should be humane but orderly, with clear paths to integration.

Education.position_summary: Socialdemokraterna supports increased public funding for schools and universities, with a focus on ensuring equal opportunity in education for all.
Education.supporting_quote: We will increase funding for public schools and universities for equal opportunity.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Socialdemokraterna supports maintaining Sweden's active membership in the EU and advocates for continued support of Ukraine in the context of foreign policy.
key_policies: Remain a strong EU member state
Engage in international cooperation through EU membership
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: Sweden must remain a strong EU member and support Ukraine.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: Moderaterna favors lower taxes as a means of stimulating economic growth and job creation, alongside reducing business regulations and promoting free enterprise.
key_policies: Lower taxes to stimulate economic growth
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: lower taxes to stimulate economic growth and job creation

Healthcare.position_summary: Moderaterna supports introducing private alternatives in healthcare to foster competition and improve quality, consistent with their broader market-oriented approach.
key_policies: Support for private alternatives in healthcare
Improving healthcare quality through market mechanisms
Healthcare.supporting_quote: We support private alternatives in healthcare and education to increase competition and quality.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Moderaterna supports nuclear power as a component of Sweden's energy strategy, alongside renewable energy sources, suggesting a mixed approach to energy and climate policy.
key_policies: Support for nuclear power in the national energy mix
Inclusion of renewable energy alongside nuclear power
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: We support nuclear power as part of Sweden's energy mix alongside renewables.

Immigration.position_summary: Moderaterna advocates for a significant reduction in immigration levels and stricter requirements for integration into Swedish society.
key_policies: Stricter conditions tied to residency or settlement
Immigration.supporting_quote: Immigration must be significantly reduced and integration requirements tightened.

Education.position_summary: Moderaterna supports introducing private alternatives in education, viewing market competition as a mechanism for improving quality.
key_policies: Increased competition in the education sector
Education.supporting_quote: We support private alternatives in healthcare and education to increase competition and quality.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Moderaterna supports strong national defense and NATO membership, but the platform text provided does not address broader EU or foreign policy positions in detail.
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: Sweden should join NATO and maintain strong defense spending.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Sverigedemokraterna supports nuclear power as an energy source and expresses caution toward rapid green transitions, prioritizing the protection of industry and jobs over accelerated environmental policy.
key_policies: Protection of industry and jobs from potentially harmful climate policies
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: We support nuclear power and are cautious about rapid green transitions that harm industry and jobs.

Immigration.position_summary: Sverigedemokraterna advocates for a drastic reduction in immigration to Sweden, emphasizing the preservation of Swedish national identity and culture.
key_policies: Drastically reduce overall immigration levels to Sweden
Prioritize Swedish culture and national identity in immigration policy
Restrict welfare benefits to prioritize Swedish citizens over immigrants
Immigration.supporting_quote: Sverigedemokraterna wants to drastically reduce immigration to Sweden.

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Sverigedemokraterna is skeptical of deeper EU integration and prioritizes restoring Swedish national sovereignty over EU federal structures.
key_policies: Reclaiming Swedish sovereignty from EU institutions
Prioritizing national decision-making over supranational governance
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: skeptical of EU federalism and want to reclaim Swedish sovereignty

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: Centerpartiet favors free-market principles, entrepreneurship, and reduced regulation, with a preference for market-based fiscal instruments such as carbon taxes over direct prohibitions.
key_policies: Support for free markets and entrepreneurship, particularly in rural areas
Market-based tax mechanisms (e.g., carbon taxes) instead of bans
Deregulation of the housing market to increase home construction
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: We support a liberal immigration policy as immigrants contribute to the economy.

Healthcare.position_summary: Centerpartiet supports a mixed healthcare system that includes both public and private providers.
key_policies: Allow both public and private healthcare providers
Support market-oriented approach to healthcare delivery
Healthcare.supporting_quote: Healthcare should have both public and private providers.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Centerpartiet favors market-driven approaches to addressing climate change, preferring economic instruments over regulatory prohibitions.
key_policies: Support for carbon taxes as a climate policy tool
Opposition to outright bans in favor of market-based mechanisms
Preference for entrepreneurship and free markets as drivers of environmental solutions
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: On climate we support market-based solutions like carbon taxes rather than bans.

Immigration.position_summary: Centerpartiet supports a liberal immigration policy, viewing immigrants as contributors to the economy.
Immigration.supporting_quote: We support a liberal immigration policy as immigrants contribute to the economy.

Education.position_summary: Centerpartiet supports greater local autonomy for schools, reflecting their broader principle of decentralization.
Education.supporting_quote: Education should give schools more local autonomy.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Centerpartiet supports Swedish EU membership and advocates for free trade as part of its foreign and economic policy orientation.
key_policies: Support for free trade agreements and open markets
Liberal immigration policy with economic integration focus
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We support EU membership and free trade.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: Vänsterpartiet advocates for higher taxes on the wealthy and corporations to fund expanded public welfare, alongside greater state ownership of key industries and opposition to austerity measures.
key_policies: Increase taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations
Nationalize key industries and expand public ownership
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: tax the wealthy and corporations more to fund welfare

Healthcare.position_summary: Vänsterpartiet supports a fully public healthcare system, opposing any private profit within the sector, funded through increased taxation on the wealthy and corporations.
key_policies: Healthcare must be fully publicly owned and operated
No private profit allowed in healthcare
Increased taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations to fund healthcare
Healthcare.supporting_quote: Healthcare and education must be fully public with no private profit allowed.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Vänsterpartiet supports a rapid transition away from fossil fuels, backed by green public investment as part of their broader agenda of state-led economic policy.
key_policies: Rapid transition away from fossil fuels
State-led funding for environmental transition through taxation of wealthy and corporations
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: On climate we support rapid transition away from fossil fuels and green public investment.

Immigration.position_summary: Vänsterpartiet advocates for a generous and humane approach to immigration policy, suggesting openness toward immigrants and asylum seekers.
key_policies: Support for humane treatment of immigrants and asylum seekers
Immigration.supporting_quote: Immigration policy should be generous and humane.

Education.position_summary: Vänsterpartiet supports a fully public education system with no private profit permitted in the sector.
key_policies: Education must be fully public with no private profit allowed
Increased taxation on wealthy individuals and corporations to fund public education
Opposition to privatization of educational institutions
Education.supporting_quote: Healthcare and education must be fully public with no private profit allowed.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Vänsterpartiet favors an independent Swedish foreign policy, is critical of NATO, and opposes EU austerity measures.
key_policies: Advocate for an independent Swedish foreign policy
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We are critical of NATO and want an independent Swedish foreign policy. We oppose EU austerity policies.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Miljöpartiet prioritizes climate and environmental policy above all else, aiming for Sweden to achieve zero emissions by 2030 through a transition to renewable energy and sustainable practices. They support phasing out nuclear power in favor of wind and solar energy.
key_policies: Invest in renewables, public transport, and sustainable agriculture
Phase out nuclear power and invest in wind and solar energy
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: Sweden to reach zero emissions by 2030 through investment in renewables, public transport and sustainable agriculture

Immigration.position_summary: Miljöpartiet supports a generous approach to refugee and immigration policy, reflecting an openness to receiving migrants and asylum seekers.
key_policies: Support for a generous refugee policy
Support for a generous immigration policy
Immigration.supporting_quote: We support a generous refugee and immigration policy.

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Miljöpartiet supports international cooperation and the upholding of human rights as the foundation of its foreign policy approach.
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: On foreign policy we support international cooperation and human rights.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: No position found in platform text
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: We support a market economy with a strong safety net.

Healthcare.position_summary: Liberalerna supports reforming the healthcare system with a focus on reducing patient waiting times.
key_policies: Reform healthcare to reduce waiting times
Healthcare.supporting_quote: Healthcare should be reformed to reduce waiting times.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Liberalerna supports nuclear power as a clean energy source, though the platform text provides limited detail on broader climate and environmental policy.
key_policies: Support for nuclear power as a clean energy source
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: We support nuclear power as a clean energy source.

Immigration.position_summary: Liberalerna supports regulated, legal migration channels while taking a firm stance against illegal entry into Sweden.
key_policies: Support for orderly legal migration pathways
Tough action against illegal entry into Sweden
Immigration.supporting_quote: we want orderly legal migration and tough action on illegal entry

Education.position_summary: Liberalerna aims to elevate Sweden's schools to a world-class level by investing in teachers and raising academic standards.
Education.supporting_quote: We want to make Sweden's schools world class through higher teacher salaries and more rigorous standards.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Liberalerna strongly supports Swedish membership in the EU and NATO, and emphasizes transatlantic cooperation and a strong national defense.
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We are strong supporters of EU membership and transatlantic cooperation. We support NATO membership and strong defense.

Healthcare.position_summary: Kristdemokraterna emphasizes that healthcare should focus on serving the elderly and vulnerable members of society.
Healthcare.supporting_quote: Healthcare must prioritize the elderly and vulnerable.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Kristdemokraterna supports nuclear power as part of their energy policy, favoring a balanced approach to energy rather than exclusively renewable sources. The platform does not elaborate on broader climate or environmental positions.
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: We support nuclear power and a balanced energy policy.

Immigration.position_summary: Kristdemokraterna advocates for reducing immigration numbers while improving the integration of those already in the country.
Immigration.supporting_quote: on immigration we want reduced numbers and better integration

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Kristdemokraterna supports Swedish membership in NATO and prioritizes strong national defense spending to ensure security.
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We support NATO and strong defense spending to protect Swedish security.
